title: Ancient Flesh
description: Adds a tiny bit more lore to ancient civilisations and zombies.
body:
Adds a tiny bit more lore to ancient civilisations and zombies.

Credits go to Knarfy (on youtube ) for the inspiration, from the video "My First Minecraft Mod Feels Like A Dream"
-And I like lore. Plus the zombies could have more stuff, LIKE A BOSS!

                          ==STUFF IN THIS THING OF A MOD==

This is the Ancient-Zombie, Someone the old civilisations looked at as a god, over time it turned green and moldy. It is the main attraction of this mod.

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fuGPbLIi/images/b95c1facbf4bf49511c57aac2ebd357d6ab12625.png)


It Also has Ore And Ingot!

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fuGPbLIi/images/c1152e36192e6173121c2759f163ce92fa82b1a8.png)

This mod also has three new structures that help you solve the mystery of how to summon this "god"

The first one tells you how this new ingot was made

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fuGPbLIi/images/3bc7def2ac18327b37bbb3d8e664f1cd66a13a9b.png)

The Second one is a tower of summoning, to teach how to summon the god.

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fuGPbLIi/images/3b9014b69a01ed3e3d06ea430ace35a6663120c0.png)

The third is a Lab

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fuGPbLIi/images/1c273f08cf9a157bcb40d68376cc5c9634dfc2e1.png)

Please Remember, This was made for fun!

-- HOW TO SUMMON --

In versions of the mod : 1.0.0 and 1.0.1 you right click a zombie with the new ingot ( or flesh axe ) , In version 1.1.0 you hit the zombie with the flesh ingot ( or flesh axe )
